title: Pet Store The Gorilla Tuff Floating Yellow Rugby Ball Dog Toy, Ideal for Throwing and Retrieval Games on land and in water. Encourages Healthy Exercise for your Dog
features: The Pet Store Gorilla Tuff Rugby Ball is designed to provide hours of fun for your dog whilst providing physical and mental stimulation
Ideal for playing throwing and retrieval games with your dog, should you throw your dog’s toy into water it floats
Textured design makes it easy for dogs and humans to grip
Made from tough durable non-toxic Thermoplastic Rubber, dirt and dribble are easily washed off
Part of an extensive range of dog toys from The Pet Store that are designed to keep your pets happy and healthy by encouraging stimulation and exercise
